summary: V68.8 Sovereign Audit - Full E2E verification for Google Play Store submission. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified - 3D scene renders, login works, owner bypass active, RPG mobile buttons tap-visible, pricing shows 5 tiers, settings toggles work, privacy/delete pages render. Build: 248KB gzipped main bundle (under 800KB limit).
critical_code_review_comments: Auth core working: register, login, /me, export, delete all functional
GDPR export returns real data (40+ docs across 7 collections for owner)
GDPR delete successfully wipes throwaway user and returns 401 on subsequent login
Owner bypass active: sparks=99999, dust visible, no trial nudge
Stripe: 5 tiers visible, webhook endpoint exists (returns 400 not 404)
Static compliance: privacy.html, delete-account.html, assetlinks.json all return 200 with correct content
assetlinks.json has BOTH SHA-256 fingerprints for Play Store
R3F v9.6.0 + three 0.183.2 upgrade working - no black screen, canvas renders
neural-connector-layer SVG overlay has pointerEvents=none - NOT blocking interactions
RPG inventory on mobile (375x812): 4 Equip/Use buttons visible and tap-accessible
Pricing page shows 5 tiers: Sedimentary, Starter, Igneous, Metamorphic, Super User
Settings page has Sound/Visual/Accessibility sections with working toggles
SPA routes /privacy and /delete-account both render correctly
Production build succeeds, main bundle 248KB gzipped (under 800KB Metabolic Seal)
seed_data_creation: Created throwaway user audit_throwaway_<timestamp>@test.com for GDPR delete test (now deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V68.8 Sovereign Audit complete. All features verified for Play Store submission: (1) Auth core with GDPR export/delete working. (2) Owner bypass grants sparks>=99999, no trial nudge. (3) Resend mail gateway functional. (4) Stripe 5 tiers + webhook endpoint. (5) Static compliance surfaces (privacy.html, delete-account.html, assetlinks.json with both fingerprints). (6) R3F v9.6.0 upgrade fixed black screen - 3D scenes render. (7) RPG inventory mobile fix verified - buttons tap-visible. (8) Build passes, 248KB gzipped main bundle. No critical issues found.
